sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31956" key="e)kexei/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκεχείριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n31956.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">travelling allowance for</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θεωροί</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">who announce a sacred truce, Inscr. Magn.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:33:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33.18</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
